title: Does Monday.com Use Salesforce for CRM or its own product
excerpt: I heard on a recent podcast that Monday.com uses Salesforce for CRM instead of its own product.  Is this true?  If so, why?

posts.author: mharding7va (Michael Harding)
posts.cookedHtml: I heard on a recent podcast that Monday.com uses Salesforce for CRM instead of its own product. Is this true? If so, why?
